headline: Stryker to announce second quarter 2026 financial results
summary: Portage, Michigan, July 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Stryker (NYSE: SYK) will host a webcast at 4:30 p.m. (Eastern time) on Thursday, July 30, 2026, to discuss its second quarter 2026 financial results. The live webcast can be accessed at Stryker - Events & Presentations. An archive of the webcast will also be available at Stryker’s website beginning approximately two hours after the live call ends. An accompanying press release that includes summary financial information for the second quarter
